name: medical clinics processing 50–100 patient files/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 50–100 patient files/month, inefficient management of paper-based records causes delays in patient care. We convert patient files into electronic health records instead of manual filing and retrieval of paper records.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of paper-based patient records.
features: search functionality for quick access to files

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient management of paper-based patient records.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For medical clinics processing 50–100 patient files/month, inefficient management of paper-based records causes delays in patient care. We convert patient files into electronic health records instead of manual filing and retrieval of paper records.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual filing and retrieval of paper records
must_have_features: search functionality for quick access to files
